official_sources.summary: 금융위원회 공식 보도자료(2025-10-23). 실손보험 청구 전산화가 의원·약국 포함 2단계로 확대, 전체 104,541개 요양기관 중 10,920개(10.4%)가 실손24 연계, 2단계 의원·약국 연계율 6.9%라고 안내.
실손24 공식 참여병원 검색 화면. “실손의료보험 전산청구 가능 의료기관 정보를 확인”할 수 있고 병원이름 검색/참여병원만 보기 기능 확인.
대한민국 정책브리핑 실손보험 온라인 청구 안내 검색 결과 확인. FSC 보도자료와 같은 공식 안내 보조 근거.

candidate_outcomes.summary: Fresh bounty scout checked 10 deep-preflight candidates after 79 raw/filter candidates; GO 0, HOLD 0. Rescue pool still dominated by closed/locked/archived/duplicate or unclear cash-route issues.
실손보험금 청구라는 직접 돈/권리 문제이고, “의원·약국도 된다”는 확대 메시지와 달리 실제 연계율·참여기관 확인이 필요해 독자 오해를 줄일 수 있음. 검색 결과 18개 샘플과 공식 실손24 참여병원 검색 근거 확인.
6월 16~30일 연납 신청과 약 2.51% 공제는 공식 근거가 있으나 아직 3주 이상 남아 있고 최근 세금/지원금 글과 구조가 겹침. 6월 중순 직전 재검토가 더 적합.
전기요금 절감이라 계절성은 있으나 공식 페이지가 동적이고 마감/손실기한이 실손24의 보험금 청구 오해보다 약함. 6월 폭염/요금 이슈 발생 시 재검토.
클릭 수요는 커 보이나 검색 결과가 SEO/AI성 글 중심이고 공식 지급·신청 근거가 불명확. 루머성 제목으로 자동 생성 금지.

top_non_go.title: Game Design: Draco Simulator + Draco Capture Ecosystem
top_non_go.body_snippet: # Draco Game Design Document ## Vision Pokemon Go for the night sky. A gamified astrophotography journey that starts with a real phone photo and progresses to a full observatory setup. Bridges real-world captures (Draco Capture mobile app) with a simulated learning platform (Draco Simulator web app). --- ## Player Progression (Levels 0-10) ### Level 0: The Spark - Player uses their phone (via Draco Capture) to take a real 10-second image of the night sky - Game plate solves it, identifies stars/constellations, measures sky quality - GPS sets their home base on the world map with real Bortle scale - Even from Bortle 9 downtown: "You captured 9 stars. That bright one is Vega. You're already an astrophotographer." - Side-by-side comparison: their phone image vs what a telescope sees ### Level 1: Tripod - Buy a cheap tripod (25 AC). Phone is stable now. - Learn why stars trail (Earth rotatio

top_non_go.body_snippet: ### Bug Details Affected component: FastAPI router and service layer for agent config API. Trigger: A client calls the route while the agent config API flow exercises the Prevent partial batch update success masking failures path. Observed behavior: the guard is applied too late or skipped on one code path, so invalid input can proceed with normal handling. Expected behavior: validation fails closed before returning data, mutating state, dispatching work, or recording success. Impact: tenants may see or mutate orchestration data outside intended API boundaries, or clients may receive misleading success responses. ### Fix Move the guard into the shared service function, validate inputs before lookup or mutation, and add route-level tests for the edge case. Specifically cover the `Prevent partial batch update success masking failures` condition in `agent config API` so future changes canno

top_non_go.body_snippet: Make sure these boxes are checked before submitting your issue - thank you! - [ Y] I have checked the superset logs for python stacktraces and included it here as text if any - [ Y] I have reproduced the issue with at least the latest released version of superset - [ Y] I have checked the issue tracker for the same issue and I haven't found one similar ### Superset version 0.19 ### Expected results I Would love to find a way to group multiple dashboards into logical groups and restrict access to each group.
